subject: Gaming
title: Flow State: Gaming's Sweet Spot
description: A tiny lesson with a big payoff: Flow State: Gaming's Sweet Spot.

hook.text: You start playing at 8pm. You check the clock. It's 2am. Where did six hours go? That's flow.

buildup.text: Psychologist Mihaly Csikszentmihalyi described flow as total absorption—when challenge matches skill.

discovery.text: Games are the easiest way to enter flow. Difficulty scales, feedback is instant, and goals are clear.

twist.text: Too easy and you're bored. Too hard and you're frustrated. Flow only happens in the narrow sweet spot.

climax.text: The best games dynamically adjust difficulty to keep you in flow without you noticing.

punchline.text: Six hours vanished. You were in flow. The game was perfectly tuned.

quiz.question: What is flow state in gaming?
options: Total absorption when challenge perfectly matches your skill level
